CommentMusicById_70a5563f90.description:
Successfully compiled but failed at runtime.

Error Analysis:
*What Failed:*  
Mockito-based unit tests failed due to incorrect stubbing.

*Where:*  
`AppControllerCommentMusicByIdTest`  
- `testCommentMusicByIdNumberOfCommentsIsNull` (line 329)  
- `testCommentMusicByIdWhenLogSaveFails` (line 268)

*Why:*  
- Attempted to stub a method returning `int` (`getNumberOfComents()`) with `null` (not allowed).  
- Attempted to use `doNothing()` on a non-void method (only valid for void methods).

*Investigate:*  
- Ensure mocks for primitive returns (e.g., `int`) do not return `null`; use a valid `int` value instead (e.g., `0`).  
- Only use `doNothing()` with void methods; for non-void, use `doReturn()` with an appropriate value.  
- Review Mockito stubbing syntax; refer to [Mockito docs](https://javadoc.io/doc/org.mockito/mockito-core/latest/org/mockito/Mockito.html) for proper use.,
